page.wrapper: bg-[#FAF9F5] h-screen overflow-hidden p-5 text-neutral-950 sm:p-7 lg:p-8
page.grid: mx-auto flex h-full w-full max-w-[740px] flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-[#d9d4c8] bg-white

left.panel: relative flex min-h-0 flex-1 flex-col overflow-hidden bg-[#FAF9F5] p-6 lg:p-7 xl:p-8
left.bg: pointer-events-none absolute bottom-[-8%] left-1/2 h-auto w-[145%] max-w-none -translate-x-1/2 opacity-100
left.header: relative z-30 flex items-center justify-between gap-5
left.divider: relative z-10 mt-7 w-[calc(100%+3rem)] -translate-x-6 border-t border-[#d9d4c8] lg:w-[calc(100%+3.5rem)] lg:-translate-x-7 xl:w-[calc(100%+4rem)] xl:-translate-x-8
left.eyebrow: mb-4 inline-flex w-fit items-center rounded-md bg-[#e4f7ea] px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-[#157a3f]
left.hero-title: max-w-[680px] text-2xl font-semibold leading-tight text-neutral-950 xl:text-3xl

benefits.card: flex min-h-10 items-center gap-3 rounded-lg border border-[#ddd7cb] bg-white/90 px-3 py-1.5 backdrop-blur
benefits.title: text-xs font-normal leading-4 text-neutral-950

auth.panel: flex min-h-0 items-center justify-center overflow-y-auto bg-white p-6 lg:p-8

language.trigger: inline-flex h-8 w-fit min-w-[170px] shrink-0 items-center gap-2 rounded-md border border-[#d9d4c8] bg-white px-2.5 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-neutral-950
